title: Quantum Annealing: Physics-Inspired Optimization
description: Explore quantum annealing as an alternative paradigm for solving optimization problems. Learn the adiabatic theorem, Ising model formulation, and compare with gate-based approaches like QAOA.
learningObjectives: Understand the principles of quantum annealing and adiabatic quantum computation
Formulate optimization problems as Ising models and QUBO
Analyze the adiabatic theorem and its implications for optimization
Compare quantum annealing with gate-based quantum optimization
Explore practical considerations for quantum annealing hardware
Apply quantum annealing concepts to real-world optimization problems
